scenario: PII prompt (주민등록번호) sent to perplexity.ai anonymous; first regression after block-response DB migration (commit 24d7095)
warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
notes: Login popup dismissed; anonymous search usable. Block warning rendered in answer area with exact expected text '보안 정책'. Network confirms POST /rest/sse/perplexity_ask followed by 503s on REST endpoints (APF intercept severing SSE stream). A red '죄송합니다. 연결이 끊어졌습니다 / 다시 시도' banner appeared below the warning — the SSE stream drop after warning injection. Block-response DB migration (24d7095) regression: warning surfaces correctly, no regression detected.
